name: Little Movers Beta Site
description: Beta site issues and improvements for littlemoversguide.com. Triaged Thursday nights. Tyler reviews harder tech issues. Sarah Mitchell reviews exercise content accuracy.

name: Little Movers Content Expansion
description: Add new exercise chapters and video embeds, expand age-range coverage from 6m to 48m

name: Algolia Search Improvements
description: Age-range facets, exercise tag search, difficulty filter - better findability for parent users

name: Signup & Email Flow
description: Fix signup debounce, confirm email via SendGrid, DKIM alignment, spam prevention

name: Mobile & Responsive Polish
description: Mobile nav overlap, hamburger menu, small-screen layout fixes across all chapters

name: Printable Exercise Handouts
description: Generate print-friendly PDFs from chapter content for parents to use offline

name: Performance & Image Optimization
description: Lazy load images, WebP conversion, Core Web Vitals improvement for slow mobile connections

name: Dark Mode Support
description: Respect prefers-color-scheme media query; palette adjustments for low-light reading

name: Exercise Difficulty Ratings
description: Add difficulty star ratings to each exercise card; parent-sourced reviews

name: 404 Redirect Cleanup
description: Map old beta URL slugs to new canonical paths via Next.js redirects config

name: Accessibility Audit
description: Alt text for all exercise images, color contrast pass, keyboard navigation check

name: PostHog Analytics Integration
description: Funnel tracking for signup flow, chapter drop-off heatmaps, weekly cohort report

name: Kubernetes Infra Hardening
description: Resource limits, liveness probes, Longhorn backup verify, Datadog dashboard review

name: Signup Form Spam Defense
description: Honeypot field, reCAPTCHA v3, SendGrid DKIM alignment to fix spam folder delivery

name: Video Clip Audit
description: Verify all Vimeo exercise embeds load; replace dead links with re-uploaded clips

name: Chapter 6 - Balance & Walking
description: New chapter covering balance beam walks, single-leg stands, and tandem gait for 18-36m

name: Chapter 7 - Fine Motor Skills
description: New chapter: pincer grip, stacking, peg-board exercises for 12-24m

name: Parent Onboarding Flow
description: Add post-signup onboarding checklist and first-week exercise recommendation email

name: Glossary of PT Terms
description: Plain-language glossary for terms like 'weight-bearing', 'proprioception', 'bilateral coordination'

name: Spanish Translation (es-US)
description: Machine-translate chapter text to Spanish; Greg reviews medical terminology accuracy
